stages.objective: Observe mixed I/O and sleep blocking transitions.
stages.goal: Identify all block and wakeup paths in one run.
stages.theory_detail: Mixed blocking workloads require reasoning about multiple unblock sources (timer and device).

hints.nudge: Tag each block cause in trace.
hints.concept: Progress depends on correctly handling every blocking source.
hints.explicit: List each block event and matching wakeup event before submit.

stages.goal: Pass wakeup and completion checks in combined workload.

hints.nudge: Check that execution resumes after each wakeup.
hints.concept: One missed resume can prevent final completion.
hints.explicit: Run until all block phases are resolved and completion metric reaches target.

stages.objective: Tune timings and preserve mixed-workload correctness.
stages.goal: Apply bounded config changes and keep all validators passing.

hints.concept: Mixed workloads are sensitive to timing; validate full path each time.
hints.explicit: Apply one latency change, rerun full workload, then verify trace and completion checks.
